title: Pilot adoption: official uses the tool to fulfill a duty / improve a constituent outcome (recorded)
context: This is the deed itself: the project is not shipped until a real office actually uses it. The pilot official demonstrably uses the tool to fulfill a duty more completely or improve a constituent outcome; the outcome is recorded with the official's confirmation. Guardrails are independently verified during actual use. This closes the beneficiary loop and constitutes the project's Definition of Shipped.
objective: Close the loop: the pilot official uses the tool in real casework or duty fulfillment, records at least one concrete constituent outcome or duty/compliance improvement with their confirmation, and the guardrails are verified to hold during actual use.
acceptanceCriteria: The pilot official demonstrably uses the tool to fulfill a duty more completely or improve a constituent outcome; the use is documented with the official's confirmation
At least one concrete outcome is recorded: a constituent case resolved, a duty fulfilled, or a compliance improvement (e.g., a flagged COI disclosed, a records-retention gap fixed)
Guardrails are independently verified to hold during actual pilot use (no bypass observed; informational-not-legal-advice labeling upheld)
The outcome record is stored in-app under outcome tracking (task 017) and confirmed by the official
The Steward confirms handoff is complete and the tool is in active use by the pilot office
output: A document recording the pilot official's confirmed use of the tool, the concrete outcome(s) achieved (duty fulfilled / constituent case improved), and the guardrail-verification result during actual use -- constituting the project's Definition of Shipped.
